## htsjdk.samtools.metrics.StringHeader
# MarkDuplicates INPUT=[/beegfs/scratch/ric.sessa/kubacki.michal/SRF_Eva/results/04_filtered/TESmut-3_with_rg.bam] OUTPUT=/beegfs/scratch/ric.sessa/kubacki.michal/SRF_Eva/results/04_filtered/TESmut-3_dedup.bam METRICS_FILE=/beegfs/scratch/ric.sessa/kubacki.michal/SRF_Eva/results/04_filtered/TESmut-3_dedup_metrics.txt REMOVE_DUPLICATES=true ASSUME_SORTED=true CREATE_INDEX=true    MAX_SEQUENCES_FOR_DISK_READ_ENDS_MAP=50000 MAX_FILE_HANDLES_FOR_READ_ENDS_MAP=8000 SORTING_COLLECTION_SIZE_RATIO=0.25 TAG_DUPLICATE_SET_MEMBERS=false REMOVE_SEQUENCING_DUPLICATES=false TAGGING_POLICY=DontTag CLEAR_DT=true DUPLEX_UMI=false FLOW_MODE=false FLOW_DUP_STRATEGY=FLOW_QUALITY_SUM_STRATEGY FLOW_USE_END_IN_UNPAIRED_READS=false FLOW_USE_UNPAIRED_CLIPPED_END=false FLOW_UNPAIRED_END_UNCERTAINTY=0 FLOW_UNPAIRED_START_UNCERTAINTY=0 FLOW_SKIP_FIRST_N_FLOWS=0 FLOW_Q_IS_KNOWN_END=false FLOW_EFFECTIVE_QUALITY_THRESHOLD=15 ADD_PG_TAG_TO_READS=true DUPLICATE_SCORING_STRATEGY=SUM_OF_BASE_QUALITIES PROGRAM_RECORD_ID=MarkDuplicates PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME=MarkDuplicates READ_NAME_REGEX=<optimized capture of last three ':' separated fields as numeric values> OPTICAL_DUPLICATE_PIXEL_DISTANCE=100 MAX_OPTICAL_DUPLICATE_SET_SIZE=300000 VERBOSITY=INFO QUIET=false VALIDATION_STRINGENCY=STRICT COMPRESSION_LEVEL=5 MAX_RECORDS_IN_RAM=500000 CREATE_MD5_FILE=false USE_JDK_DEFLATER=false USE_JDK_INFLATER=false
